step1.title: Privacy & POPIA Consent
step1.subtitle: Your information is protected under the Protection of Personal Information Act (POPIA)
step1.body: CSERI (Centre for Social Entrepreneurship) at the Durban University of Technology collects your information solely to understand community challenges and match them to incubation programme solutions. Your contact details are confidential and will never be published or shared without your consent.
step1.checkboxLabel: I understand and consent to my information being collected and used as described above

step2.title: Who are you?
step2.subtitle: Select the option that best describes you
step2.error: Please select a role to continue

step3.title: Contact Details
step3.subtitle: Your contact information is confidential and will not be published
step3.emailError: Please enter a valid email address

step4.title: Community Challenge
step4.subtitle: Tell us about the challenge your community is facing
step4.challengeDescriptionHint: Describe the problem in as much detail as possible
step4.suitsIntlStudents: This challenge could be addressed by international students

step5.title: Submission Confirmed!
step5.subtitle: Thank you for submitting your community challenge. CSERI will review it and be in touch.
step5.pdfNote: PDF download available in the full version
step5.next2: Your challenge is matched to relevant incubation programmes
step5.next3: A CSERI representative will contact you if a match is found
